# CWE-1265 vulnerable: nested lock on same mutex
lang: go
file: CWE-1265-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1265: Unintended Reentrant Invocation of Non-reentrant Code Via Nested Calls.
// Vulnerable: audit hook re-enters UpdateBalance while mutex is already held.

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

var ledgerMu sync.Mutex

func UpdateBalance(db *sqlx.DB, userID int, delta float64) error {
	ledgerMu.Lock()
	defer ledgerMu.Unlock()
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE balances SET amount = amount + $1 WHERE user_id = $2", delta, userID)
	return err
}

func PostTransfer(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		from := c.GetInt("from_user")
		amount := c.GetFloat64("amount")
		ledgerMu.Lock()
		if err := UpdateBalance(db, from, -amount); err != nil {
			ledgerMu.Unlock()
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		ledgerMu.Unlock()
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	}
}
